scope: single-task smoke benchmark (write mode: 民眾線上申辦系統 RFP)
note: pass_rate is MEASURED by rfp_lint grader. V3 grader = 20 completeness checks + 4 regex compliance rules (placeholder / presentation_weight / price_weight / weight_sum); a draft passes only with 0 missing Blockers AND 0 rule violations. time_seconds and tokens are conservative estimates (per-run latency not instrumented). A full instrumented run across the 13-eval set remains a deferred item.
